name: Prompt Assembly & Preparation Pipeline
description: 提示词流水线:模板拼装、输入清洗与多语言准备

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['prompt_pipeline','prompt','scrubbing','templating','locale'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(prompt template|prompt pipeline|prompt assembly|input scrubbing|prompt version|system prompt|prompt injection scrub|prompt preparation)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
